honesty: This instrument chains proved and measured lemmas. It does NOT prove Collatz. The reduction identifies the exact residue: Terras record-band integers, frontier residents, and the finite scan gaps between proved band ceilings.
open_exactly: SCAN_GAP: Terras violations in the first open band need n in a finite window above 1000000000 not yet scanned (width ~2^1.0 bits if first_open else 'n/a').
Frontier residents (tau=infinity): positive integers in survivor set S — divergence.
Pointwise extreme-value gap: no theorem yet that gamma(n) <= 19.982 for all n.
Cycles beyond 2^71: excluded computationally; structural gamma >= 10^9 floor proved.

proof_chain.label: Localization (FRONTIER-GEOMETRY Thm 3)
proof_chain.statement: Any counterexample orbit minimum m has sigma(m)=infinity; either tau(m)=infinity (frontier resident) or m is below its class certificate threshold at depth tau(m).

proof_chain.label: Threshold vacuity (THRESHOLD-ENVELOPE)
proof_chain.statement: No certified class traps n >= 2^d at any depth; Terras violations must satisfy n < 2^tau(n) (certificate-record integers, gamma > 1).

proof_chain.label: Record ceiling (RECORD-BAND)
proof_chain.statement: Alive Terras violations obey n <= o/(2 ln2 delta(o)); per convergent band this gives explicit gamma floors (first open: gamma >= 1530.6).

proof_chain.label: Delta-squeeze band exclusion (this lab)
proof_chain.statement: 9 convergent bands below the first open band are proved empty of Terras violations past 1000000000.

proof_chain.label: Terras scan
proof_chain.statement: tau(n) = sigma(n) for all 1 < n <= 1000000000 (zero exceptions).

proof_chain.label: eps-invariance barrier (SIBLING-CONTROL)
proof_chain.statement: Parity-word statistics cannot separate Collatz from 3n-1; proofs must consume intercept sign (eps=+1).

reductions.collatz_full: Every positive integer reaches 1 (no divergent orbit, no nontrivial cycle).
reductions.cycle_conditional: A nontrivial cycle minimum m exceeds 2^71 (Barina) and satisfies m <= X(tau(m)); the first band whose ceiling clears 2^71 gives the minimum odd count of its certificate prefix.
reductions.unconditional_terras_half: Terras conjecture <=> no certificate-record integer r with T^tau(r) >= r (self-trap / gamma > 1 band).
reductions.under_terras: Collatz <=> S intersect Z_{>0} = empty (frontier has no positive integers). Terras (tau=sigma) already implies no nontrivial cycle.

first_open_band.reason: violations past 1000000000 need n in (1000000000, 2193206481] with tau >= 50509; not covered by scan
